## What's being added

<!-- What is this item (document/map/article/link)? Where did it come from? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Added a Markdown file in `_items/` with the required front matter (`title`, `type`, `era`)
- [ ] `era` matches a key in `_data/eras.yml`
- [ ] Scanned file (if any) added under `assets/files/<type>/`, with a descriptive filename
- [ ] Filled in `rights` — noting public domain / permission granted / status unknown
- [ ] Previewed locally with `bundle exec jekyll serve` (or confident the front matter is correct)
- [ ] Content is in scope: county history, not personal genealogy
